def f(nums):
    nums.sort()
    n = len(nums)
    new_nums = [nums[n//2]]
    
    if n % 2 == 0:
        new_nums = [nums[n//2 - 1], nums[n//2]]
    
    for i in range(0, n//2):
        new_nums.insert(0, nums[n-i-1])
        new_nums.append(nums[i])
    return new_nums

    return new_text

def f(L):
    N = len(L)
    for k in range(1, N//2 + 1):
        i = k - 1
        j = N - k
        while i < j:
            # swap elements:
            L[i], L[j] = L[j], L[i]
            # update i, j:
            i += 1
            j -= 1
    return L
